Optimizing Warehouse Operations for a Large Retailer with Adi Stock

Client: Global Retail Solutions · Industry: Retail

PHPLaravelVue.jsMySQLBarcode/QR Scanner

The Challenge

Global Retail Solutions managed multiple large warehouses with manual inventory tracking, leading to frequent stock discrepancies, slow order fulfillment, and inefficient space utilization.

The Solution

Implemented Adi Stock, providing real-time stock tracking and multi-location warehouse support. Integrated barcode and QR code scanning streamlined receiving and dispatch processes. Demand forecasting features helped optimize stock levels.

Results & Impact

  • Reduced inventory discrepancies by 90%.
  • Increased order fulfillment speed by 30%.
  • Optimized warehouse space utilization, leading to cost savings.
  • Improved overall supply chain visibility and control.
